notes: Found 5 live MJPEG streams at University of Houston (webcams.uh.edu). All return multipart/x-mixed-replace content-type. Streams are construction cameras for the Centennial Project and Freshman Housing. Purdue Engineering Mall MJPEG stream (webcam01.ecn.purdue.edu) found in a public GitHub repo but timed out on connection — likely offline. Most universities have migrated to HLS/embedded video players. The UH streams at webcams.uh.edu are the first actual MJPEG university feeds found.
